login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Log in to manage your move and household.

errors.generic: Login failed. Please check your email confirmation or try again.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email address first. Check your inbox (including spam).

reset.title: Reset password
reset.success: If an account with this email exists, a password reset link has been sent.

errors.redirectNotAllowed: The redirect URL is not allowed in Supabase. Please add the URL in Authentication > URL Configuration > Redirect URLs.
errors.unknown: An error occurred while resetting the password.

password.requiredChangeDescription: Please set a new password before continuing.

landing.heroTitle: Your smart Moving Planner & Home Organizer
landing.heroSubtitle: Plan your move without stress and keep your household organised afterwards. Everything in one place.

move.title: Moving Planner
move.description: Packing lists, tasks, budget and timeline - everything you need for a stress-free move.

home.title: Home Organizer
home.description: Inventory, finances, shopping and household members - for organised everyday life after the move.

moveSection.title: Everything you need for your move
moveSection.subtitle: From the first plan to the last moving box.

todoLists.title: Smart to-do lists
todoLists.description: Keep track of every task. Automatic categorisation and prioritisation help you stay organised.

packingLists.title: Intelligent packing lists
packingLists.description: Organise your belongings with QR codes, photos and AI support for quick lookup.

budgetTracker.title: Budget tracker
budgetTracker.description: Manage moving costs, track income and expenses, and avoid unpleasant surprises.

transport.title: Transport & volume planner
transport.description: Calculate the loading volume and transport costs needed for your move.

aiAssistants.title: AI assistants
aiAssistants.description: Let intelligent assistants help you create packing and to-do lists.

qrSystem.title: QR code system
qrSystem.description: Generate and scan QR codes for boxes so you can identify contents quickly.

homeSection.title: Everything you need for everyday life
homeSection.subtitle: The Home Organizer helps you stay on top of things after the move.

inventory.title: Household inventory
inventory.description: Manage furniture, devices and valuables with photos, rooms and categories.

finance.title: Finance manager
finance.description: Income and expenses, category limits, savings goals and a 30-day cash flow forecast.

householdMembers.title: Household members
householdMembers.description: Assign tasks, expenses and items to individual people in your household.

tasksProjects.title: Tasks & projects
tasksProjects.description: Plan DIY, renovation and everyday tasks with priorities and due dates.

shoppingStock.title: Shopping & supplies
shoppingStock.description: Smart shopping lists and stock management with minimum quantities so nothing is forgotten.

homeAi.title: AI household assistant
homeAi.description: Intelligent help for budget analysis, inventory capture and smart household planning.

landing.ctaTitle: Ready for a smarter everyday life?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Start with the Moving Planner or directly with the Home Organizer - free and without a credit card.
